items.text:
NOTICE: Extended Hours at Thornton Science Library
Effective Monday, December 1

To support students during final exams, Thornton Science Library will extend its hours through December 19. Please note the following changes:

- The library will stay open until 2:00 AM on weeknights, and the third-floor quiet room is reserved for silent work.
- Group study rooms on the first floor may be booked online for up to three hours per day through the campus portal.
- Returns are due by midnight; a $5 late fee applies to each overdue item.

Students must present a valid ID to enter after 10:00 PM. Staff remind everyone that food is not allowed in the quiet room. Questions may be directed to the front desk or emailed to thornton.help@campus.edu.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must students present to enter the library after 10:00 PM?
questions.explanation: The notice states that "Students must present a valid ID to enter after 10:00 PM."

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this notice?

options.A: To announce a new late-fee policy
options.B: To advertise the group study rooms
options.C: To explain how to book the quiet room
options.D: To inform students of extended exam-period hours

questions.explanation: The notice's overall purpose is to tell students that library hours are being extended during final exams.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about an item returned after midnight?

options.A: It can no longer be borrowed again.
options.B: It must be returned to the front desk.
options.C: It will incur a five-dollar fee.
options.D: It will be removed from the catalog.

questions.explanation: Returns are due by midnight and "a $5 late fee applies to each overdue item," so an item returned after midnight is overdue and charged five dollars.
